name: Kahlua Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 3/4 oz package chocolate pudding and pie filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
3. Pour batter into a greased 12-cup Bundt or tube pan.
4. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes.
5. Cool completely.
6. Invert cake onto a serving plate.
7. Drizzle icing over the top and sides, if desired.
